OR team diagram showing relationships between Anesthesia, Surgeon, Scrub, and Nurse roles

demonstrated_techniques: statistical data presentation for evidence-based teaching
common_errors_addressed: poor communication in OR leading to tension and disruptions
lack of coordination between hospital departments
inadequate teamwork training in surgical environments

confidence_rationale: This is clearly an educational presentation about OR teamwork and communication, not an FLS task performance. The content focuses on team training and simulation-based education rather than individual technical skills assessment.
technique_summary: Educational presentation on OR teamwork challenges and simulation-based solutions. Uses visual analogies, statistical evidence, and interactive elements to teach about communication failures and team training interventions.
